name: music-rules
description: Constraint-based music theory checker and composer (EIS + Fuxian counterpoint) for AI-driven MIDI generation. Adds an MCP server that exposes 34 tools — corpus introspection, fragment checkers, full-passage evaluation, EIS root-line + scale + chord + voice-leading + NCT + OOD helpers, and a SkyTNT MIDI bridge with a constrained generate-and-filter loop — plus skills that teach the agent how to call them.
